summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bus Management System with 3 new features: Duty Assignment module, Passengers KPI drill-down, and sidebar logo fix. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@tgsrtc.com / admin123
Dashboard shows Passengers KPI card with clickable 'Click for details' text
Click Passengers KPI -> navigates to /passenger-details page
Passenger Details: period filter (daily/monthly/quarterly) works
Passenger Details: depot, bus, route filters work
Passenger Details: shows trend chart, route-wise table, bus-wise table
Sidebar has 'Duty Roster' nav item - click navigates to /duties
Sidebar has 'Passengers' nav item - navigation works
Sidebar logo shows Bus icon (not 'TS' text) - logo fix working
Duty Roster page: shows seeded duties for today (8 duties)
Duty page: Assign new duty with driver, bus, route, start/end points, trip times
Duty page: Edit existing duty dialog opens correctly
Duty page: Send SMS for individual duty (simulated) works
Duty page: Send All SMS button works
Duty page: Date filter works
Duty page: Each duty shows 2 trips (outward + return) with times
Backend: GET /api/duties returns duty list (8 duties found)
Backend: POST /api/duties creates new duty successfully
Backend: PUT /api/duties/{id} updates duty
Backend: DELETE /api/duties/{id} deletes duty
Backend: POST /api/duties/{id}/send-sms simulates SMS (logs to console)
Backend: POST /api/duties/send-all-sms works for bulk SMS
Backend: GET /api/passengers/details with all filter combinations
Backend: GET /api/passengers/details daily/monthly/quarterly periods
Backend: GET /api/passengers/details depot/bus/route filters
Backend: GET /api/passengers/details date range filters
Dashboard KPI cards: Revenue and KM Operated are clickable
Revenue KPI navigation to /revenue-details works
KM KPI navigation to /km-details works
All 72 backend API endpoints (100% success rate including new duty and passenger APIs)
